texto: I do not think we were afraid of death
autor: life had become such an infinitely boring alternation between a period of stimulation which failed to stimulate and of depression which hardly even depressed.
explicacao: Citação de life had become such an infinitely boring alternation between a period of stimulation which failed to stimulate and of depression which hardly even depressed. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I do not think we were afraid of death” articula reflexao, aleister-crowley, diary-of-a-drug-fiend em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
